result:
PASS — C-MPACK-01 source index completeness verified with no findings.

All 25 numbered source docs (00–24) are classified in both the §1 freeze table and §2.1 classification table, with the duplicate combined doc correctly excluded. Actual ATX heading counts in `workbook/matter_dev_docs/` match the §2.1 table exactly per-doc and total **201** rows, each classified exactly once using only allowed classification values. The §2.1 checksum line (`section_rows=201; m365_doc08_rows=11; silent_omission_count=0`) is confirmed accurate. One out-of-scope note recorded: doc 23's family label differs between §1 ("횡단") and §2.1 ("GOV"), which doesn't affect completeness.

notes: Source-doc completeness verified: all 25 numbered docs (00-24) appear in both the §1 freeze table and the §2.1 classification table of docs/matter-pack-integration/matter-pack-source-index.md. The combined doc workbook/matter_dev_docs/matter_개발문서_통합본.md is correctly excluded as a content duplicate per index line 6.

Heading-row count verified against actual files: ran Grep '^#{1,3} ' over workbook/matter_dev_docs/*.md. Per-doc ATX heading counts match the §2.1 table row counts exactly for all 25 docs. Grep total = 428 across 26 files; subtracting 227 in the excluded combined doc yields 201, equal to the §2.1 table row sum (5+9+10+6+9+7+10+9+11+9+8+10+7+7+7+19+6+7+3+5+10+9+7+4+7=201).

Classified-exactly-once verified: for every doc the actual heading count equals the table row count, so there is no silent omission (no under-count) and no phantom/duplicate row (no over-count). Rows are sequential #1..#N per doc with distinct anchors. Hard cases reconcile: doc 15 has 19 rows mixing ## and ### (R0-R14) matching the file's 19 headings; doc 18 (217 lines) has only 3 ATX headings matching its 3 rows.

Allowed-classification check passed: the 6 distinct values used (covered_but_requires_trace, adapt_required, adapt_required_pending_user_decision, new_required, defer_with_revisit_gate, reject_with_reason) are all members of the §2 allowed set; implemented_by_existing_plan is unused in §2.1 (used only in §3) which is acceptable. Doc 08 = 11 rows all defer_with_revisit_gate (M365 delegation). The §2.1 checksum line (section_rows=201; allowed_classification_only=true; m365_doc08_rows=11; silent_omission_count=0) is confirmed accurate.

No headings were found inside code fences that would distort the count; every grep-matched line is a genuine section heading (title + numbered sections + R-release subsections). Spot-checked anchor slugs (e.g. doc 17, doc 15 R0-R14, doc 05) map correctly to the source headings.

Minor, out of scope for this completeness check: doc 23 family is labeled '횡단 (UPR/UPQ 시드)' in §1 but 'GOV' in §2.1 (type 'requirement' is consistent in both). This family-label discrepancy does not affect the 25-doc / 201-row classified-once completeness verdict.

Scope limits honored: read-only with Read/Grep/Glob only; did not verify §1 SHA256 freeze or line-count totals (out of scope and not runnable in this mode). Verdict is based solely on source-index completeness and one-time classification of the 25 docs and 201 heading rows.
